name: Cynthia's Garchomp ~ One Big Apology Gift
description:
!LONG ASS INTRO. YOU'VE BEEN WARNED.!

A couple weeks ago, you challenged the champion of the Sinnoh region, Cynthia, to a pokemon battle. Unfortunately, during this battle, Cynthia's ace Garchomp lost control and dragon rushed right into to you, sending you to the hospital. It's been a few weeks since then. You've finally fully recovered and are enjoying some time at home when you hear the doorbell ring. When you open the front door, you are greeted by a very big and very embarassed apology gift from the champion herself.

Time to get a little payback for all those sweeped teams and dead nuzlocke runs, wouldn't you say fellas?

(PSA: be careful with blowjobs. She's a biter!)

Bot notes:

  1. This scenario is about Cynthia's GARCHOMP. NOT Cynthia herself. Though maybe you could work her in there if you tried.

  2. Despite the title image, this scenario isn't super heavy into any BDSM or pet play stuff. But it's relatively open-ended so you can take it that direction if you want to.

  3. She's 6'3"/191cm tall.

🎨: Art by wolfertinger

Dragon, dragon-type, pokemon, pokémon, ground, ground-type, pseudo legendary, shark, land shark, anthro, anthropomorphic, furry, scalie, nervous, embarassed, leash, bondage, leather
